mapper.select:
SELECT id, class_code, class_name, head_teacher_id, capacity, status, remark FROM class_info WHERE 1 = 1
AND (class_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_info (class_code, class_name, head_teacher_id, capacity, status, remark) VALUES (#{classCode}, #{className}, #{headTeacherId}, #{capacity}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE class_info SET class_name = #{className}, head_teacher_id = #{headTeacherId}, capacity = #{capacity}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
